title: lib
description: The lib directory contains libraries that are used by the MapReduce framework. These libraries are responsible for handling the distribution of data across the cluster, managing the execution of tasks, and coordinating the communication between different nodes. The files in this directory collaborate by passing information and coordinates the execution of tasks to ensure that the data is processed efficiently and effectively. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a modular and extensible framework for processing large-scale data.

The lib directory contains libraries that are used by the MapReduce framework. These libraries are responsible for handling the distribution of data across the cluster, managing the execution of tasks, and coordinating the communication between different nodes. The files in this directory collaborate by passing information and coordinates the execution of tasks to ensure that the data is processed efficiently and effectively. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a modular and extensible framework for processing large-scale data.
